entries.reason: User explicitly requested fixing the remaining live wiki/open-harmony issues and validating search quality on the local open-harmony corpus, which requires syncing a focused design note for this bugfix scope.

User explicitly requested that any still-missing answer-quality improvement ideas be added in the following steps, including query rewriting/multi-query retrieval and stronger local answer-quality evaluation.
User explicitly approved the canonical chunk contract design and authorized proceeding with implementation of RAGEXEC-013.
User explicitly requested design-only research, planning, and a new security-first design spec for the embedded local RAG quality-evaluation system.
User explicitly requested a design-only task to create/update scratchpad research+plan artifacts and add a new design spec for the embedded local RAG quality-evaluation system.
User approved implementation planning with the stricter rule that real verification corpora are local-only and must never be committed, quoted, or hardcoded in code, tests, docs, or artifacts.
User approved the new RAG roadmap and explicitly requested breaking it into concrete tasks while marking old RAG planning documents and task placeholders as outdated.
